name: ppt-design-slider
description: Turn raw slide content into a designed PowerPoint deck. Picks from 36 embedded HTML templates (magazine + swiss + 34 editorial styles), splits user content into slides, delivers two files: deck.pdf (vector) + deck.pptx (native PowerPoint, fully editable — uses a pptxgenjs fallback when auto HTML→PPTX can't preserve the design). Runtime-neutral — works with any Agent Skills runtime.
